name: Shelley Moore Capito
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,059,420 for Shelley Moore Capito in U.S. Senate, WV. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,059,420.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
